lessons.title: Unit 1A: Friends - Lesson 4: Why do you like him?
lessons.desc:
- Review L3 vocab
- Is he/she shy? Yes, he is/she is. // No, he isn't/she isn't.
New structure: 
- Why do you like him/her? - Because she's kind and clever.

worst_speaking_items.question: How are you today?
worst_speaking_items.user_transcript: Ha, I heard, go with you.

worst_questions.question_text: Listen and choose the correct answer (Con hãy nghe và chọn phương án đúng.)
worst_questions.comment_plain: Audio: Why do you like him? - Because he's friendly. Tại sao bạn thích anh ấy? - Bởi vì anh ấy thân thiện. => Đáp án: A

worst_questions.question_text: Read and fill in the blank (Con hãy đọc và điền đáp án đúng.) Lisa: Do you have any brothers or sister? Jack: I have a brother. Lisa: What does he look ... (1)? Jack: He's ... (2) and ... (3). Lisa: Is he handsome? Jack: ... (4), he is. Lisa: Do you like him? Jack: Yes, I like him.
worst_questions.comment_plain: Ảnh: cao = tall (He's tall: Anh ấy cao.) => Đáp án: (2) - tall

worst_questions.question_text: Read and fill in the blank (Con hãy đọc và điền đáp án đúng.) Lisa: Do you have any brothers or sister? Jack: I have a brother. Lisa: What does he look ... (1)? Jack: He's ... (2) and ... (3) . Lisa: Is he handsome? Jack: ... (4), he is. Lisa: Do you like him? Jack: Yes, I like him.
worst_questions.comment_plain: Ảnh: gầy = thin (He's tall and thin: Anh ấy cao và gầy.) => Đáp án: (3) - thin
